summary: Implemented Stage 9B insight validation CLI through insight-validate, validating reusable insight JSON payloads with Stage 9A InsightRecord contracts and printing normalized output without touching planning SQLite, insight markdown, Codex local state, or skills.

tests_run.command: uv run --no-sync python -B -m pytest tests/test_insight_cli.py tests/test_insights.py -q -p no:cacheprovider
uv run --no-sync ruff check src\codex_supervisor\cli.py tests\test_insight_cli.py scripts\check_file_justification.py --no-cache
uv run --no-sync ruff format --check src\codex_supervisor\cli.py tests\test_insight_cli.py scripts\check_file_justification.py --no-cache

tests_run.summary: 338 passed plus Ruff, format, mypy, CLI smoke checks, file justification, public hygiene, planning integrity, skill inventory, source inventory, protected locks, and uv lock --check.

CLI loads an insight JSON file, validate.evidence: insight-validate loads --insight-path JSON, validates through validate_insight_record_payload, and --json prints the normalized InsightRecord dataclass with next_action and list fields.

CLI rejects invalid insight payloads wit.evidence: tests/test_insight_cli.py asserts invalid payloads return exit code 1, no stdout, an explanatory stderr message, unchanged planning/insight sentinel files, and no new files.

CLI supports both next_action and markdo.evidence: tests/test_insight_cli.py covers markdown-style next action input and asserts the CLI normalizes output to next_action.

Focused tests cover valid CLI output, in.evidence: uv run --no-sync python -B -m pytest tests/test_insight_cli.py tests/test_insights.py -q -p no:cacheprovider passed with valid output, invalid failure, label compatibility, human output, and no-mutation coverage.

review.summary: Fresh-thread-style local review found no actionable findings for the Stage 9B insight validation CLI diff.

risks: The CLI intentionally validates only a standalone JSON payload; writing or updating insight markdown remains a later Stage 9 slice.
Live Codex Exec remains disabled for this worker run because local Codex CLI preflight is still unavailable in this environment.
follow_up_tasks: Shape the next Stage 9 slice for a guarded knowledge graph update workflow that consumes validated InsightRecord payloads.
Add skill promotion or golden-eval wiring once durable insight writes exist.
handoff_notes: Stage 9B adds insight-validate in cli.py. It validates Stage 9A reusable insight JSON, supports both next_action and markdown next action labels, prints normalized JSON or human-readable output, and does not open planning SQLite or write insight files.
